news.t: Asset Allocation Summit: Opportunities in Direxion's Leveraged-Inverse Suite
Tech, AI ETFs are soaring, but flows show investors holding back
Direxion rolls out Nvidia-focused ETFs for bulls and bears

holdings.infoBox: NVDD is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily NVDA Bear 1X ETF (NVDD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides inverse (-1x) exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of NVIDIA stock. NVDD was launched on Sep 13, 2023 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Tech, AI ETFs are soaring, but flows show investors holding back
data.text: Hi! In this week's ETF Wrap, you'll see how investor demand for tech and artificial-intelligence ETFs this year pales in comparison with their strong performance.

data.title: Direxion rolls out Nvidia-focused ETFs for bulls and bears
data.text: Direxion is rolling out two new exchange-traded funds (ETFs) tied to the price movement in shares of Nvidia Corp , the financial products provider said on Wednesday, seeking to capitalize on excitemen...
